source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for direct English incident UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese operations labels, alert states, sensor tables, and compact dashboard metrics.
layout: Alert-ready 8px grids, thorn-line separators, clear status hierarchy, steady coastal spacing, restrained shadows, and dense operational data surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent gorse flowers motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a gorse flowers motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete botanical subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A compact coastal heath gorse spray with vivid golden yellow pea-shaped flowers, thorny dark green stems, small needle leaves, sea-grey wind-weathered undertones, a few closed buds, crisp spines, resilient rugged coastal identity, botanical accuracy, natural matte texture. It must unmistakably read as gorse flowers, not broom, wattle, mimosa, lupine, or generic yellow blossom.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full flowering thorn spray without cropping. Clean studio lighting, crisp edges, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no vase, no hand, no pot, no insects, no coastal landscape, no second plant species, no text, no watermark, no decorative background.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Gorse light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Gorse", derived from the visible transparent gorse flower cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible resilient alert system.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, no portrait crop, no square crop. Clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels. Use short labels, spacious modules, and no tiny paragraphs.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Gorse, Gorse Flowers, Light Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius 8px, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from vivid gorse golden-yellow flowers, dark thorn green stems, small needle leaves, sea-grey coastal weathering, heath grass neutrals, brown bud fuzz, and rugged alert-ready thorn geometry. The board must read as gorse flowers on coastal heath, not broom, wattle, mimosa, lupine, sunflower, or generic yellow floral UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep all text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert banners, cards, table rows, search command palette, left navigation, incident dashboard metric cards, uptime chart, coastal sensor data table, filters, empty/loading/error states, status chips, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, coastal-fog light backgrounds, golden gorse primary actions and alert highlights, thorn-green navigation and confirmation states, sea-grey borders, heath-neutral surfaces, peat-ink foreground, thorn-line separators, subtle petal grain texture. Quiet utilitarian operational UI, resilient and alert, not a marketing page.
Color palette: gorse golden yellow, blossom amber, thorn green, needle olive, sea grey, coastal fog, heath sand, peat ink, bud brown; only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif.
Constraints: no unrelated purple or blue gradients, no neon colors, no generic yellow-only palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Gorse", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Gorse dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Gorse". It must feel like the visible Morphous Gorse light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible gorse flowers motif.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, no portrait crop, no square crop. Clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels. Use short labels, spacious modules, and no tiny paragraphs.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Gorse, Gorse Flowers, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius 8px, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve the visible light board structure, component coverage, typography guidance, token roles, resilient alert dashboard density, and gorse visual language. Use the light board as the layout reference and convert it to dark mode. Preserve motif-derived palette roles: peat-ink and thorn-green dark surfaces, coastal-fog foreground text, golden gorse active controls and warning highlights, sea-grey borders, bud-brown severity accents, needle-olive success states, petal-grain texture, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as gorse flowers on coastal heath, not broom, wattle, mimosa, lupine, sunflower, or generic alert UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep all text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert banners, cards, table rows, search command palette, left navigation, incident dashboard metric cards, uptime chart, coastal sensor data table, filters, empty/loading/error states, status chips, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep peat-ink background, thorn-green and dark olive cards, coastal-fog text, golden gorse primary actions, blossom-amber charts, sea-grey dividers, subdued alert red-brown for destructive states, subtle thorn-line overlays and petal-grain texture, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls. Quiet utilitarian operational UI, resilient and alert, not a marketing page.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated purple or blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic yellow-only palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Gorse", no illegible tiny paragraphs.
